package com.example.service;

import org.apache.velocity.VelocityContext;
import org.apache.velocity.app.VelocityEngine;
import org.apache.velocity.exception.VelocityException;

import java.io.StringWriter;
import java.util.Properties;

/**
 * Service class for rendering user dashboards using Apache Velocity templates.
 */
public class VelocityTemplateService {

    // Static Velocity engine instance for performance optimization
    private static final VelocityEngine velocityEngine;

    // Initialize Velocity engine once when the class is loaded
    static {
        Properties props = new Properties();
        // Disable Velocity's internal logging to avoid dependencies
        props.setProperty("runtime.log.logsystem.class", "org.apache.velocity.runtime.log.NullLogChute");
        // Set the input encoding to UTF-8
        props.setProperty("input.encoding", "UTF-8");
        // Set the output encoding to UTF-8
        props.setProperty("output.encoding", "UTF-8");

        velocityEngine = new VelocityEngine();
        try {
            velocityEngine.init(props);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException("Failed to initialize Velocity engine", e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Renders a personalized user dashboard based on the provided template.
     *
     * @param userId            User ID used to identify the user
     * @param dashboardTemplate Dashboard template content with Velocity syntax
     * @return Rendered HTML string
     * @throws RuntimeException if template rendering fails
     */
    public String renderUserDashboard(String userId, String dashboardTemplate) {
        // Create a new Velocity context and add userId
        VelocityContext context = new VelocityContext();
        context.put("userId", userId);

        // Prepare writer for output
        StringWriter writer = new StringWriter();

        try {
            // Render the template with the provided context
            velocityEngine.evaluate(context, writer, "dashboard", dashboardTemplate);
            return writer.toString();
        } catch (VelocityException e) {
            // Handle Velocity-related exceptions
            throw new RuntimeException("Error rendering dashboard template", e);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Handle any other exceptions during rendering
            throw new RuntimeException("Unexpected error during template rendering", e);
        }
    }
}
